libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Ensure the generated/native test setup passes these nativeTest runtime JVM properties for 5.0.1 as well: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Keep WebClient tests self-contained with an in-process Vert.x HttpServer on localhost rather than relying on external HTTP services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Local Gradle and native-image verification remain authoritative; these properties address the known Netty 4.2.x on Java 25 native runtime access issue but do not replace metadata validation.
Optional Vert.x features such as OAuth2-backed authentication may require optional dependencies, but they are not necessary for meaningful core WebClient coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 still resolves Vert.x Core with Netty 4.2.x, and the existing 5.0.0 scaffold already documents that Netty 4.2.x needs explicit unsafe-access runtime properties for Java 25 native-image runs. No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful WebClient coverage; local Vert.x HttpServer-based tests are sufficient.
